user_query: The workshop on Day 3 ends at 11am and then I have nothing until the AGO at noon. Add a coffee break in between. there's a good cafe near the gallery.

fields.name: Coffee Break at Grange Park
fields.description: A quick coffee break at a local cafe near the Art Gallery of Ontario to decompress after the workshop.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user wants a coffee break between the workshop (ending at 11:00 AM) and the AGO (starting at 12:00 PM). Position 2 inserts the new node after the 'Stakeholder Presentation' (index 1) and before the 'Art Gallery of Ontario' (index 2).
